name: Aliaxis Group S.A. / N.V.
lede: Aliaxis runs three capability centers across three Indian cities. Bengaluru, Salcete and Kolkata, covering manufacturing and R&D, built over six years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Aliaxis office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Aliaxis GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Aliaxis runs 3 verified GCC centers across 3 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Salcete, Kolkata), covering manufacturing and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: Chief Information Officer - Ashirvad by Aliaxis

about.description: Aliaxis's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Salcete and Kolkata, spanning manufacturing and R&D. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Steel Pipes and Tubes, Industrial Manufacturing

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all twenty decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Aliaxis operate in India?
faq.a: Aliaxis operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Aliaxis have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Aliaxis's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru, Salcete and Kolkata.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Aliaxis run in India?
faq.a: Aliaxis runs manufacturing and R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Aliaxis's India GCCs?
faq.a: Aliaxis's India centers employ in the 101 to 200 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Aliaxis's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 20 leaders at Aliaxis's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
